title: Youmind 19395 Cd
prompt: Creative a CD cover art that is printed on a CD. with {argument name="style" default="striking, avant-garde editorial collage style"} with creative colour theme. The diameter CD must be the same as the width and height of the image. It must have the "compact disc" logo included. The cover art should be featuring the {argument name="subject" default="girl"} as in <User Portrait>. Any part of the girl must not be appear at the centre of the CD. You can get creative on her outfit, mood, facial expression and pose, but her face and features should not be changed. 1:1 aspect ratio
